evan mobley.detail: Played 37 minutes with no injury flags or external sources indicating issues.

jalen brunson.detail: Played full 40 minutes in a blowout win; scored 19 points on 7-16 FG, narrowly missing the 20-point threshold while recording a playoff-high 14 assists.
jalen brunson.web_narrative: Brunson shot 1-7 from three and finished with 19 points, one shy of the 20-point over. His playmaking focus (14 assists) came at the expense of shot volume, and he had no injury-related absence.

james harden.detail: Played 32 minutes; sources confirm Harden is playing through a fractured thumb, which likely affected his performance and may have influenced minutes management.
james harden.web_narrative: Harden is managing a fractured thumb and finished with only 2 assists in 32 minutes, well below the 4-assist over. The thumb injury likely impacted his ability to facilitate offense effectively.

jarrett allen.detail: Played 29 minutes with no injury flags or external sources indicating issues.

og anunoby.detail: Played 32 minutes with no injury flags or external sources indicating issues.
